summary: Completed end-to-end testing of BakeryOS pastry management system. Backend APIs fully functional (100% success rate), frontend UI loads correctly, but CRITICAL Mixed Content Security Policy issue prevents all API integration from working.

integration_issues.issue: Mixed Content Security Policy blocking HTTP API calls from HTTPS frontend
integration_issues.details: Frontend correctly detects HTTPS backend URL but axios is making HTTP requests. Browser blocks HTTP requests from HTTPS pages. All stats show 0, Kanban shows 'Nessun ordine', simulate button shows success toast but no actual API call succeeds.

passed_tests: Backend Order Stats endpoint (200 OK) - Shows actual data: total_orders: 6, pending: 4, production: 2, today_revenue: 438.00
Backend Update Order Status endpoint (200 OK)
Frontend Dashboard page loads with correct UI layout
Frontend Navigation between pages works (Dashboard, Orders, Inventory)
Frontend Kanban board displays with correct columns (Ricevuti, In Produzione, Pronti, Completati)
Frontend 'Simula Ordine WP' button is clickable and shows success toast
Frontend UI components render correctly without JavaScript errors

success_percentage.backend: 100% (9/9 API endpoints working with real data)
success_percentage.frontend_ui: 95% (UI loads, navigation works, components render correctly)
success_percentage.frontend_integration: 0% (All API calls blocked by Mixed Content Security Policy)

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix Mixed Content Security Policy issue. Frontend environment shows correct HTTPS URL (https://sweettrack-4.preview.emergentagent.com) but axios is making HTTP requests. Console shows 'Mixed Content: The page at 'https://...' was loaded over HTTPS, but requested an insecure XMLHttpRequest endpoint 'http://...'. This prevents: 1) Dashboard stats loading (all show 0), 2) Kanban board loading orders, 3) Actual order simulation (only shows toast), 4) All API integration. Backend APIs work perfectly via HTTPS.
